ProgressTrack.EmptyState: No active tracks. Swear a vow to begin.

RemoveDialog.Title: Remove Track
RemoveDialog.Body: Permanently remove {label}? This cannot be undone.

Notification.GenerateFailed: Portrait generation failed for this entity. Check console for details.
Notification.RegenerateFailed: Portrait regeneration failed. Check console for details.

EntityPanel.EmptyState:
No entities tracked yet.
They appear here when created via the entity modules.

RegenDialog.Title: Regenerate Portrait
RegenDialog.Body: This is your one permitted regeneration. The new portrait will be permanently locked. Continue?

Safety.GMNote: Global Lines and Veils are set by the GM. Your private Lines are visible only to you.
Safety.PlayerNote: Mischief dial is controlled by the GM.

Lines.Label: Lines — Hard Limits
Lines.Description: Absolute. Content matching a Line will never appear regardless of other settings.

Veils.Label: Veils — Soft Limits
Veils.Description: Present in context packets. Content will be redirected, not strictly excluded.

PrivateLines.Label: Private Lines — Visible only to you
PrivateLines.Description: Stored on this client. Never shared with GM or other players.

Safety.XCardNote: Type /x in chat at any time to immediately suppress the current scene.

Mischief.CeilingNote: Safety configuration is always a hard ceiling on the mischief layer. Active Lines and Veils are injected before any mischief is applied, regardless of dial setting.

lawful.Label: Lawful
lawful.Description: Always interprets the most rules-literal reading of player narration. No misdirection. Confirmations are plain.

balanced.Label: Balanced
balanced.Description: Default. Interprets with context and intent. Occasional wry asides when interpretation is ambiguous. No mechanical misdirection.

chaotic.Label: Chaotic
chaotic.Description: May read subtext over surface text. Asides are openly smug. May choose a mechanically distinct but narratively fitting move when interpretation is genuinely ambiguous.

About.Description: Move interpretation, narration, entity tracking, and art generation for Ironsworn: Starforged.

OpenIssues.Label: Open items requiring manual resolution:
OpenIssues.LoremasterID: Confirm Loremaster module ID (replace "loremaster" placeholder in index.js)
OpenIssues.LoremasterFlag: Confirm Loremaster flag path for context consumption

XCard.Message:
Scene paused. Current content is suppressed.
The story will redirect at the next narration beat.

Notifications.PortraitGenerateFailed: Portrait generation failed for this entity. Check console for details.
Notifications.PortraitRegenerateFailed: Portrait regeneration failed. Check console for details.

STARFORGED.Settings.Dial.Name: Mischief Dial
STARFORGED.Settings.Dial.Hint: Controls how aggressively the module interprets ambiguous player narration.
STARFORGED.Settings.GlobalLines.Name: Global Lines (Hard)
STARFORGED.Settings.GlobalLines.Hint: Hard content limits. Always injected first in every Loremaster context packet.
STARFORGED.Settings.GlobalVeils.Name: Global Veils (Soft)
STARFORGED.Settings.GlobalVeils.Hint: Soft content limits. Present in context packet but may be acknowledged rather than strictly excluded.
STARFORGED.Settings.PrivateLines.Name: Private Lines
STARFORGED.Settings.PrivateLines.Hint: Personal hard limits visible only to you. Injected into your context packets.
